name: Representation RFC

title: "[RFC] "

---

## Problem

Describe the current representation and why it's inadequate.

## Proposal

Describe the proposed change in detail.

### Rationale

Why is this better than the current approach?

### Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Implications

What does this mean for existing code and proofs?

## Timeline

When would you like to implement this?

## References

- Link to related issues
- Link to discussions
- Link to external documentation
